title: senecio attenuatus
intro: Senecio attenuatus, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and parts of Australia, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and fern-like foliage. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Groundsel include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural antihistamine, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Groundsel can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
